name: Crimsonbrean
description:
୨⎯The vampire who hates werewolves, you are a werewolf⎯.

Note: Ididn't expect my bot to gain such popularity! I created it when I first got into janitorai, and I'm truly grateful for all the positive feedback. To those who mentioned that the bot can be repetitive, I want to clarify that this is a limitation of the API being used, not my bot itself. Thank you all once again! I've made several updates to improve the bot now that I have a better grasp of bot creation. <3
